label: Field Director — France
criteria: Based in France. Fluent in French and English. 3+ years leading field/operations teams. Comfortable with high-volume, fast-paced environments.

label: Product Designer
criteria: Strong product design portfolio (end-to-end, not just UI). Experience shipping B2B or complex SaaS products. Comfortable with ambiguity and fast iteration.

label: Backend Engineer
criteria: Strong backend experience (Python or Node). Built and scaled APIs and data pipelines. Bonus: experience with LLM/AI products.
